title: acronia scabrilinguis
intro: Acronia scabrilinguis is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, native to the tropical forests of the Philippines. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Acronia scabrilinguis include reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting wound healing, as well as exhibiting potential antiviral and antifungal properties. Acronia scabrilinguis can be prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its leaves are also used in traditional medicine, often combined with other herbs to enhance its effects.
